Welcome to the New Cape Cod Makers Website
We've launched a new website built with Astro and hosted on GitHub Pages — faster, easier to maintain, and open source.

<!-- TODO: Replace with real announcement content from Cape Cod Makers -->

We're excited to launch our new website! Built with modern web technologies, the new site is:

- **Fast** — static pages load instantly with no heavy CMS overhead
- **Easy to maintain** — content is written in simple Markdown files
- **Open source** — anyone can contribute improvements via GitHub

Stay tuned for more updates from our makerspace community.

Drop in to tour our facilities, meet members, and learn about membership options. No RSVP required.

<!-- TODO: Replace with actual event description from Cape Cod Makers organizers -->

Join us for our monthly open house! This is a great opportunity to:

- Tour our workshop and see our equipment
- Meet current members and ask questions
- Learn about membership tiers and benefits
- Try out some of our tools with guidance from experienced members

No experience necessary. All are welcome.

All-hands shop cleanup day. Members help keep our space safe and organized.

<!-- TODO: Replace with actual description of the General Clean event -->

Our periodic General Clean events keep the makerspace safe and welcoming for everyone. All members are encouraged to participate.

**What to expect:**
- Organizing and cleaning all work areas
- Returning tools to their proper places
- Disposing of scrap material
- Light maintenance tasks

Lunch will be provided. Come help out!
